---
format: html
---

# CEE Guidelines {.unnumbered}

This is a demonstration of the living guidelines concept applied to the

> *Guidelines and Standards for Evidence Synthesis in Environmental Management VERSION 5.1*

This repo contains a sample chapter (Chapter 8) and demonstrates the potential workflow for updating the guidelines.

There are issue templates to help contributors make a contribution and there is a [contribution guide](https://github.com/DrMattG/CEE_Guidelines/blob/main/contribution.md).

On acceptance of this approach for updating the CEE Guidelines I will move this repo under the control of CEE (in an organisation on GitHub).

Use the navigation bar to browse chapters, or start here:

- [Aims & Scope](Aims_&_Scope.qmd)
- [Chapter 1](Chapter_1.qmd)
- [Chapter 2](Chapter_2.qmd)
- [Chapter 3](Chapter_3.qmd)
- [chapter 4](Chapter_4.qmd)
- [chapter 5](Chapter_4.qmd)
- [chapter 6](Chapter_4.qmd)
- [chapter 7](Chapter_4.qmd)
- [chapter 8](Chapter_4.qmd)
- [chapter 9](Chapter_4.qmd)
- [chapter 10](Chapter_4.qmd)
- [chapter 11](Chapter_4.qmd)
